mapper.insert:
insert into wecom_group ( room_id, group_name, group_owner_id, group_owner_yst_user_id, group_owner_name, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.roomId}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.groupOwnerId}, #{item.groupOwnerYstUserId}, #{item.groupOwnerName}, now(), now() )
on duplicate key update group_name = values(group_name), group_owner_id = values(group_owner_id), group_owner_yst_user_id = values(group_owner_yst_user_id), group_owner_name = values(group_owner_name), update_time = now()
mapper.select:
select g.room_id as roomId, g.group_name as groupName, g.group_owner_name as groupOwnerName, m.last_msg_time as lastMsgTime from wecom_group g left join ( select room_id, max(msg_time) as last_msg_time from wecom_message where room_id is not null and room_id != '' group by room_id ) m on g.room_id = m.room_id where 1 = 1
and g.group_name like concat('%', #{groupName}, '%')
and g.group_owner_name like concat('%', #{groupOwnerName}, '%')
order by m.last_msg_time desc, g.room_id desc

select room_id as roomId, group_name as groupName, group_owner_id as groupOwnerId, group_owner_yst_user_id as groupOwnerYstUserId, group_owner_name as groupOwnerName from wecom_group where room_id = #{roomId}
